title: gentiana alsinoides subsp. scabrifilamenta
intro: Gentiana alsinoides subsp. scabrifilamenta, also known as Scaber Gentian or Himalayan Gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Gentiana alsinoides subsp. scabrifilamenta is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
